title: App Settings - General - Account - Share Data section is not visible for logged User
scenario: Share Data section missing from Account settings for logged-in user in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Log in with valid user credentials.
3. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
expected: The Account screen should display the user's name and email, a "Log out" button, and the "Share Data" section should be visible.
